description: You are an engineering team lead performing a thorough weekly inbox triage. Your inbox contains 50 emails from various technical mailing lists, some of which are parts of ongoing discussion threads. Identify all discussion threads containing 3 or more messages, create a folder named 'Active-Threads', and move every email belonging to these threads into it. Among the remaining inbox emails, identify those related to spam filtering, security, viruses, or abuse prevention, create a folder named 'Security-Review', and move them there. Create a triage report at ~/Documents/triage_report.txt listing each thread found with its discussion topic, message count, and each participant's full name and email address. The report should also include the total emails processed, security emails found, emails remaining in inbox, and a verification line confirming these three numbers sum to 50. Finally, draft an email to engineering-manager@company.com with subject 'Weekly Inbox Triage Report' summarizing the most active thread and the security review findings. Login credentials: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
